Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis

Enum Class AxisOrder

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<AxisOrder>
net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AxisOrder>, Constable, Comparator<Position>
@AvailableSince("0.0.46") public enum AxisOrder extends Enum<AxisOrder> implements Comparator<Position>
Represents the order of axes in 3D space and provides utilities for working with positions and dimensions according to the specified axis order. Implements Comparator for comparing Position objects based on the axis order.

Each enum constant defines a unique permutation of the axes (X, Y, Z).

  • XYZ: X, then Y, then Z
  • XZY: X, then Z, then Y
  • YXZ: Y, then X, then Z
  • YZX: Y, then Z, then X
  • ZXY: Z, then X, then Y
  • ZYX: Z, then Y, then X

Provides methods for retrieving axes, creating positions and dimensions, iterating over positions, and comparing positions according to the axis order.

Since:
0.0.46

    • iterator

      public Iterator<Position> iterator(Position pos0, Position pos1, double step)
      Returns an iterator over positions between pos0 and pos1 with the given step, following this axis order.
      Parameters:
      pos0 - the starting position
      pos1 - the ending position
      step - the step size
      Returns:
      an iterator over positions

    • compare

      public int compare(Position position, Position other)
      Compares two positions according to this axis order.
      Specified by:
      compare in interface Comparator<Position>
      Parameters:
      position - the first position
      other - the second position
      Returns:
      a negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as the first position is less than, equal to, or greater than the second
